title: alocasia jiewhoei
intro: Alocasia jiewhoei, also known as the Jiewhoei Elephant Ear or the Black Velvet Alocasia, is a rare species of flowering plant in the family Arum. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves containing compounds that have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming the plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as promoting digestive health and immune system function. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of the Alocasia jiewhoei plant are often used to make teas and infusions, which are believed to have a calming effect and aid in the treatment of various ailments.
